data.body: Richard F. Outcault created Buster Brown in 1902.  Popular strip it featured wealthy mischievous boy his girl friend Mary Jane & pet dog, Tige. In 1904 Brown Shoe Company were licensed to use characters to promote their shoes. Success followed & promotions expanded to films, radio, & eventually tv.

data.body:
After my dad passed, I'd occasionally see a red cardinal in my tree.

Then my mom passed.

When a pair of cardinals appears shortly after the passing of a second parent, it's apparently a sign that they've found each other and are now together in the afterlife.

They are also eating my bird food.

data.body: When the light of the first nuclear explosion in July of 1945 was seen in Alamogordo it was a signal that the age of tribalism was coming to an end. Having developed the ability to destroy ourselves we could no longer afford to live as isolated, warring communities.
